pi_items.source: Verified from task instructions in task.json which specify saving the workbook as 'Product_Hierarchy' (resulting in 'Product_Hierarchy.dva').
Verified from task instructions which require setting the title to 'Sales and Profit Hierarchy'.
Verified from task instructions and existence of 'Sales' and 'Profit' columns in the dataset.
Verified from task instructions and existence of 'Product Category' and 'Product Sub Category' columns in the dataset.
Verified from task instructions and confirmed 'Office Supplies' is a valid unique value in the 'Product Category' column of the dataset.
Verified from task instructions explicitly naming the loaded dataset as 'Sample Order Lines', derived from 'sample_order_lines2023.xlsx'.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires using a synthetic sample dataset ('Sample Order Lines') containing columns for 'Sales', 'Profit', 'Product Category', and 'Product Sub Category'. The 'Product Category' column includes 'Office Supplies' as one of its values. The objective is to create a Sunburst chart analyzing 'Sales' (Size) and 'Profit' (Color) across 'Product Category' (Inner Ring) and 'Product Sub Category' (Outer Ring), while excluding 'Office Supplies'. The resulting visualization must be titled 'Sales and Profit Hierarchy' and saved as 'Product_Hierarchy.dva'.
